Overrides.Override: Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp

Override.dn: Tattoo of the Kitava Blood Drinker

Overrides.Override: 0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
6% reduced Effect of Curses on you
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
